Package egovframework.let.cop.bbs.service.impl

Class EgovBBSLoneMasterServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl
egovframework.let.cop.bbs.service.impl.EgovBBSLoneMasterServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EgovBBSLoneMasterService
@Service("EgovBBSLoneMasterService") public class EgovBBSLoneMasterServiceImpl extends org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl implements EgovBBSLoneMasterService
게시판 속성관리를 위한 서비스 구현 클래스
Since:
2009.08.25
Version:
1.0
Author:
공통 서비스 개발팀 한성곤
